nasb.text: The victory that day was turned to mourning for all the people, for the people heard it said that day, “The king is grieved for his son.”

esv.text: So the victory that day was turned into mourning for all the people, for the people heard that day, “The king is grieving for his son.”

cnv.text: 那一天，眾人勝利的歡樂變成了悲哀，因為他們聽說王為他的兒子傷痛。

ccb.text: 士兵们听说王为押沙龙哀痛，胜利的欢腾顿时变为一片哀愁。
